case_title: CARMEN VELEZ VS. RAE, ROSEMARY DBA GLEN PARK MONTESSORI PRESCHOOL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RAE, ROSEMARY DBA GLEN PARK MONTESSORI PRESCHOOL
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VELEZ, CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT RAE, ROSEMARY DBA GLEN PARK MONTESSORI PRESCHOOL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELEZ, CARMEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAE, ROSEMARY DBA GLEN PARK MONTESSORI PRESCHOOL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED APR-22-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RAE, ROSEMARY DBA GLEN PARK MONTESSORI PRESCHOOL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2008 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAY-30-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE GIVEN TO BOTH PARTIES IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
